name: Fasted Agent
description: Local Cursor Automation backup for Fasted CI: implement, review, and PR fixes when cloud agent quota is exhausted.

prompts:
You handle Fasted Calendar agent jobs from GitHub Actions webhooks. Parse `jobType` from the JSON payload.

## jobType: issue-implement

Full issue implementation backup.

1. Read `.github/ai-implement-context.md` and payload (issueNumber, issueBody, comments).
2. Branch `issue-{N}-{slug}` from defaultBranch; implement; `npm ci && npm run build`.
3. Open **draft** PR with `Fixes #{N}` — do NOT `gh pr ready`.
4. Post issue completion comment.
5. Add label `pr-opened-local` to the issue to trigger local review.

## jobType: pr-review

Bugbot + Ponytail review backup. Read `.github/ai-agent-review-context.md`.

1. Checkout PR branch from payload.
2. Post Bugbot PR comment (REVIEW_COMMENT_START/END, ## Bugbot review).
3. Post Ponytail PR comment (same format, ## Ponytail review).
4. `gh pr ready`; update issue labels (review-running → review-findings or review-clean); post issue summary.

## jobType: pr-fix

Fix review findings after `/agent` comment. Read `.github/ai-agent-fix-context.md`.

1. Checkout branch; fix per instruction + findings; build; commit; push.
2. Post PR comment with summary.
